metadata.title: RAG Starter Kit - Production-Ready RAG Chatbot
metadata.description: A production-ready RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) chatbot boilerplate powered by Next.js 15, LangChain, and PostgreSQL pgvector.

hero.title: Build AI-Powered
hero.description: A production-ready RAG starter kit powered by Next.js, LangChain, and PostgreSQL. Deploy intelligent chatbots that understand your documents in minutes, not months.

features.title: Everything You Need
features.subtitle: A complete toolkit for building production-ready RAG applications without the boilerplate.

rag.title: Intelligent RAG
rag.description: Context-aware responses using LangChain and pgvector for unprecedented accuracy and recall.

ingestion.title: Seamless Ingestion
ingestion.description: Upload and instantly process PDFs, Word docs, and text files with intelligent auto-chunking.

latency.title: Ultra-low Latency
latency.description: Lightning-fast token streaming engineered for natural, uninterrupted conversation flow.

memory.title: Persistent Memory
memory.description: State-of-the-art semantic memory powered by PostgreSQL with pgvector extension.

enterprise.title: Enterprise Ready
enterprise.description: Built with NextAuth, role-based access, and audit logging for production deployments.

async.title: Async Processing
async.description: Background job processing with Inngest for handling large documents and batch operations.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Get up and running in three simple steps. No complex configuration required.

1.title: Upload Documents
1.description: Drag and drop your PDFs, Word documents, or text files. We handle the rest.

2.title: Automatic Processing
2.description: Our system chunks, embeds, and indexes your content using state-of-the-art AI models.

3.title: Start Chatting
3.description: Ask questions in natural language and get accurate, cited answers from your documents.

techStack.title: Modern Tech Stack
techStack.subtitle: Built with the latest technologies for performance, scalability, and developer experience.

cta.title: Ready to Get Started?
cta.description: Deploy your own AI-powered document chatbot in minutes. Clone the repo, set your environment variables, and start chatting.

footer.builtWith: Built with ❤️ using Next.js, LangChain, and PostgreSQL

signIn.title: Welcome back
signIn.subtitle: Sign in to your account to continue

signUp.title: Create an account
signUp.subtitle: Get started with your next-gen intelligence suite
signUp.name: Full name
signUp.passwordHint: At least 8 characters, mixed case & numbers

errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
errors.invalidPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, and number
errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.

chat.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

documents.title: Documents
documents.dragDrop: Drag and drop files here, or click to select
documents.supportedFormats: Supported formats: PDF, DOCX, TXT, MD
